summary: Excellent matrix recording of a high‑energy 5/7/77 show with standout Half‑Step, Big River and Wharf Rat performances.
review: The matrix blend delivers crystal‑clear soundboard detail plus just enough audience ambience to make the night feel alive. Fans rave about the unstoppable energy of set 1 culminating in the Minglewood → Half‑Step → Big River sequence and a sublime second set highlighted by a soaring Wharf Rat, while Jerry’s guitar work and Phil’s bass are repeatedly praised.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviews award five stars and consistently praise both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality, indicating an exceptional show with excellent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix combines clear SBD (soundboard) fidelity with enough audience ambience; reviewers call it crisp, outstanding and the best‑ever sound quality for this show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set 1 builds a powerful crescendo ending with the Minglewood → Half‑Step → Big River → Tennessee Jed sequence; the second set is described as sublime from opening notes to the closing Wharf Rat.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his lead guitar improvisations and ability to move the audience; called unmatched.
band_member_comments.Phil: Described as a beast throughout the performance.
